normal.body: {"code":200,"data":{"status":"success","message":"提供商重新加载成功","providers":[{"value":"anthropic","name":"Anthropic","description":"Anthropic提供的AI模型，包括Claude系列","icon":"https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67ce28cfec624e2b733f8a52/680790a96fa4599db312dc7b_opengraph.png","default_base_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","supported_types":["chat"],"features":["流式响应","工具调用","高安全性","图片识别"]},{"value":"custom","name":"自定义API","description":"连接任何兼容OpenAI的API服务，或自托管的模型服务","icon":"https://ollama.com/public/ollama.png","default_base_url":null,"supported_types":["chat","completion","embedding"],"features":["自定义终端","灵活配置","本地部署","流式输出"]},{"value":"google","name":"Google","description":"Google提供的AI模型，包括Gemini系列","icon":"https://g.autoimg.cn/@img/car2/cardfs/series/g28/M07/14/D1/300x300_autohomecar__ChxkmmTCOmCABVVvAADqUrllBts727.png?format=webp","default_base_url":null,"supported_types":["chat","embedding"],"features":["流式响应","函数调用","多模态"]},{"value":"local","name":"本地模型","description":"使用ModelScope框架加载本地或托管的开源模型，支持聊天和文本生成","icon":"//img.alicdn.com/imgextra/i4/O1CN01fvt4it25rEZU4Gjso_!!6000000007579-2-tps-128-128.png","default_base_url":null,"supported_types":["chat","completion"],"features":["本地推理","自定义模型"]},{"value":"ollama","name":"Ollama","description":"Ollama提供的本地或远程运行的开源大语言模型，支持Llama、Mistral等多种模型","icon":"https://ollama.com/public/ollama.png","default_base_url":"http://localhost:11434","supported_types":["chat","completion","embedding"],"features":["本地模型","流式响应","自定义模型","图片识别"]},{"value":"openai","name":"OpenAI","description":"OpenAI提供的AI模型，包括GPT-3.5和GPT-4系列","icon":"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/04/ChatGPT_logo.svg","default_base_url":"https://api.openai.com/v1","supported_types":["chat","completion","embedding"],"features":["流式响应","函数调用","并发请求","图片识别"]}]},"msg":"操作成功"}
